name: Metallizing Parasite - Lunatite
name_jp: メタル<ruby lang="jp"><rb>化</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>か</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>寄</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>き</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>生</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>せい</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>生</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>せい</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>物</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ぶつ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>－ルナタイト
desc: Once per turn, during your Main Phase, if you control this monster on the field, you can equip it to a face-up monster on your side of the field as an Equip Spell Card, OR unequip the Union equipment and Special Summon this card in face-up Attack Position. While equipped to a monster by this card's effect, that monster will be unaffected by the effects of Spell Cards controlled by your opponent. (1 monster can only be equipped with 1 Union Monster at a time. If the monster that this card is equipped to is destroyed as a result of battle, destroy this card instead.)
mnst_eff: Once per turn, during your Main Phase, if you control this monster on the field, you can equip it to a face-up monster on your side of the field as an Equip Spell Card, OR unequip the Union equipment and Special Summon this card in face-up Attack Position. While equipped to a monster by this card's effect, that monster will be unaffected by the effects of Spell Cards controlled by your opponent. (1 monster can only be equipped with 1 Union Monster at a time. If the monster that this card is equipped to is destroyed as a result of battle, destroy this card instead.)
eff: Once per turn, during your Main Phase, if you control this monster on the field, you can equip it to a face-up monster on your side of the field as an Equip Spell Card, OR unequip the Union equipment and Special Summon this card in face-up Attack Position. While equipped to a monster by this card's effect, that monster will be unaffected by the effects of Spell Cards controlled by your opponent. (1 monster can only be equipped with 1 Union Monster at a time. If the monster that this card is equipped to is destroyed as a result of battle, destroy this card instead.)

mst: Unaffected by the opponent's Spell Cards
summoning: Special Summons itself from your Spell & Trap Zone
